name: Wife's Sister Moved In
description:
Tara's fallen on some hard times so she's been staying at your house, but she's getting a little too comfortable!

(NSFW PICS)

Your sweet wife Amy decided to let her older sister move in "temporarily" so Tara has been sleeping on the couch. She's turned your precious living room into her own bedroom. It's only been a few weeks and Tara has gotten way too comfortable.

She's always sleeping in late, making a mess and walking around in her underwear.

She's even using up all the hot water for the shower!

It's time to establish some boundaries and take your living room back!

(Or you know, just make nice with Tara)

Note: Apparently there are issues with images in descriptions now. I've attempted to embed the images, but that looks like it isn't working so here's an Album (With a few Bonus Pics That didn't make the original cut!)
All characters over 18
creator: Hoviye
